name: IRC_CAND_OPTIN_HISTORY
description: Stores history of marketing/job alerts optin by candidates and associated consent data for GDPR compliance.

columns.Name: HISTORY_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Candidate who opted for marketing/job alerts. Foreign Key to PER_PERSONS.

columns.Name: SITE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Stores the list of sites where the candidate opted for job alerts, pipe delimited.

columns.Name: OPT_IN_MKT_EMAILS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating whether the candidate opted for marketing emails.

columns.Name: OPT_IN_TC_EMAILS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating whether the candidate opted for job alerts at a site.

columns.Name: CAND_TERRITORY_CODE
columns.Comments: Territory code indicating candidate's country of residence.

columns.Name: DOI_EMAIL_SENT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating whether double optin email has been sent to candidate.

columns.Name: CONSENT_SUBJECT
columns.Comments: Stores the subject of the Double Opt-In message sent to the candidate.

columns.Name: CONSENT_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time when the candidate confirmed his Opt-In preferences.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
